name: T Stamp Inc
summary: T Stamp Inc. (Trust Stamp) develops and markets AI-powered identity authentication software for enterprise, government, and peer-to-peer markets. Products leverage machine learning, computer vision, cryptography, and data mining to detect fraud, protect sensitive data, and enable digital identity verification. Key offerings include biometric authentication, liveness detection, information tokenization, presentation attack detection, and the Orchestration Layer platform, serving financial services, government, and inclusion markets globally.

products.name: Orchestration Layer
products.description: Platform integrating identity authentication services, updated in response to market feedback.

products.name: StableKey (Stable IT 2)
products.description: Generates a cryptographic key directly from user biometrics, mathematically correlated to all user passwords and PINs without storing secrets.

products.name: Biometric Authentication and Liveness Detection
products.description: Enables identity verification using biometric data for unbanked and underserved populations.

products.name: Information Tokenization
products.description: Privacy-preserving tokenization of sensitive identity and biometric data.

products.name: Embedded Ownership Verification for Cryptographic Assets
products.description: Technology for verifying ownership of crypto-assets including stablecoins and Central Government Digital Currencies.

products.name: Alternatives to Detention (ATD) Solution
products.description: Patented biometrics, geolocation, and tokenization solution for criminal justice and immigration compliance monitoring.

products.name: Presentation Attack Detection
products.description: Patented technology to detect spoofing and fraudulent attempts in biometric identity verification.

partnerships.description: Program partnership to empower sustainability and social impact, helping Trust Stamp scale globally in financial inclusion.
Provided funding to support Trust Stamp's Tokyo office for pursuing APAC regional opportunities.

partnerships.partner_name: K-Startup Grand Challenge 2025 (South Korea Ministry of SMEs and Startups)
partnerships.description: Acceleration program supporting Trust Stamp's presence in South Korea and Asia-Pacific expansion.
Participation in the Trust Valley program in the Geneva region of Switzerland.
Participation in the Founders Arena wealth management program.
